comment: Readings are competing interpretations of the same image — a 'cipher' reading, a 'botanical' reading — each its own coloured pass over the marks.
_showoff: Box the rail; the showroom itself uses four readings (studio/viewer/embed/power) — point that out.

comment: The rail lists every reading. The eye toggles a reading's marks on or off; the pen picks which reading you're authoring into.
_showoff: Two controls, two boxes if you want to split them.

comment: Give each reading a colour — its identity in the legend and on the canvas.
Describe a reading in a line so readers know what lens they're looking through.
Hover a reading to solo it — isolate one interpretation, or compare two side by side.
_showoff: Solo-on-hover also works in the Viewer legend (V7).
